title: Onyx Ore
description: Onyx Ore Mod adds a new rare ore to Minecraft: Onyx! Mine it deep underground to craft powerful tools and durable armor. Enhance your survival with stronger gear and expand progression with this shiny new resource.nture
body:
Onyx Ore

Embark on a new adventure with the Onyx Ore Mod, a Minecraft expansion that adds a powerful new resource to discover, mine, and craft. Hidden deep underground, Onyx Ore is a rare and mystical material that opens the door to stronger tools, deadlier weapons, and armor that can withstand even the harshest battles.

🔹 What’s Inside?

Onyx Ore – A brand-new ore that generates naturally between Y -64 and Y 16. Hard to find, but worth every block you mine.

Onyx Ingots – Smelt down your ore into ingots, the core material for crafting this mod’s new gear.

Onyx Tools & Weapons – Pickaxes, swords, axes, shovels, and hoes – tougher, sharper, and longer-lasting than diamond. Perfect for both mining expeditions and combat encounters.

Onyx Armor – Full armor sets that grant you exceptional durability and protection, making you a true force to be reckoned with.

Balanced Progression – Onyx isn’t just handed to you; you’ll need to dig deep and work hard to unlock its true potential, ensuring a rewarding gameplay experience.

🌍 Why Play With Onyx Ore?

This mod is perfect for players who want:

A fresh challenge in mining and exploration.

Stronger gear to aid in survival and combat.

A lore-friendly addition that blends seamlessly into vanilla Minecraft.

More excitement in late-game progression.

⚒️ Future Plans

This is just the beginning! Future updates may include:

Special abilities tied to Onyx gear.

Decorative blocks and building materials.

🔥 With the Onyx Ore Mod, mining becomes more thrilling, combat more rewarding, and your world more alive. Dig deeper, craft stronger, and rise above with the power of Onyx!
